_README: Hand-transcribed free-provision STOCK (thousand TL) for partitions the deterministic classifier in src/audit_reports/free_provision.py cannot read — the cancellation-heavy / multi-figure Turkish disclosure tail. Same principle as data/manual_statements.json. Keyed BANK -> PERIOD -> KIND. `source` records where it was read. An override wins outright over extraction. Verified by hand against the source PDFs 2026-07-15.
